data.title: BARK Announces Annual Meeting Results and Alignment with Continued Operational Progress and Long-Term Stockholder Value
data.description: BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK), a prominent dog brand aiming to ensure all dogs are happy, recently disclosed outcomes from its Annual Stockholders Meeting on March 25, 2026. The meeting included approval for a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of the Company's common stock, a move to elevate the per-share trading price and achieve compliance.

data.title: Vitesse Energy Announces Leadership Transition, With Jamie Benard to Join as President and Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Vitesse Energy, Inc., based in Greenwood Village, Colorado, disclosed that Jamie Benard has been named the President and Chief Executive Officer, starting from May 1, 2026. This appointment, tagged with the ticker symbol VTS on NYSE, follows a comprehensive succession planning initiative aimed at ensuring the company's sustained strategic growth and prosperity in the coming years. The Board of Directors expressed their pleasure in welcoming Jamie Benard to lead the team.

data.title: EWTN Remembers Mother Angelica, Witness to Providence, 10 Years After Her Death
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Vatican City, EWTN Global Catholic Network will honor its founder, Mother Angelica, who passed away 10 years ago. A Mass will be held at St. Peter's Basilica in Rome on March 27 to commemorate her. Mother Angelica, a member of the Poor Clares order, has left a lasting legacy in the Catholic community.

data.title: RH to Report Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results on March 31, 2026
data.description: RH, a leading home furnishings company (NYSE: RH), is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, ending on January 31, 2026. The announcement will be made on Tuesday, March 31, 2026, after the market closes. The presentation will feature Gary Friedman, RH's Chairman and CEO, discussing the company's ongoing growth and recent achievements. The financial report will include key numbers for investors and stakeholders to review the company's performance.

data.title: Apex Dental Partners Becomes AGD Accredited PACE Provider, Expanding Continuing Education Opportunities for Dentists
data.description: In Dallas on March 26, 2026, Apex Dental Partners announced their expansion of providing top-notch continuing education for their partner clinicians with the accreditation as an AGD accredited PACE provider through the Academy of General Dentistry. This move enables Apex to deliver acknowledged quality education to its partners.

data.title: Bloom Energy Appoints Simon Edwards as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In San Jose, California, Bloom Energy has appointed Simon Edwards as the new Chief Financial Officer, starting on April 13, 2026. Edwards, a finance veteran with almost 20 years in scaling technology firms, will bring valuable operational expertise, systems leadership, and digital infrastructure experience to Bloom Energy. The company, listed on NYSE as BE, is a prominent player in onsite power solutions. This strategic move aligns Edwards' skills with Bloom's market focus and growth strategy.

data.title: Bitwise Announces Monthly Distributions for IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in San Francisco, Bitwise Asset Management, a prominent crypto asset manager, revealed the monthly distributions for its range of Option Income Strategy ETFs. The funds included in this announcement are IMST, ICOI, IMRA, IGME, ICRC, and IETH. Each fund will be providing distribution per share at varying rates. This move further solidifies Bitwise Asset Management's position as a key player in the crypto investment market.

data.title: Laird Superfood Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Laird Superfood, Inc. (NYSE American: LSF) based in Boulder, Colorado, announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. The company reported a 15% increase in net sales during this period, mainly attributed to the growth in the wholesale sector and expanding presence in grocery and club markets. Jason Vieth, the Chief Executive Officer, described the year 2025 as significant for Laird Superfood. Despite positive sales growth, profit margins were influenced by factors related to commodity pricing.

data.title: ROC Access Face1 Wins “Best in Biometrics” at ISC West 2026 Security Industry Association New Products and Solutions Awards
data.description: Recognition from the industry confirms the innovation of (Company Name)'s intelligent biometric access control hardware, which includes real-time threat detection capabilities. This recognition showcases the company's expertise in creating cutting-edge security solutions to address current threats effectively. The technology embedded in the access control hardware has been acknowledged for its advanced features and ability to detect threats as they occur. This validation from industry experts solidifies (Company Name)'s position as a leader in the security sector. The innovative biometric access control hardware has impressed professionals with its abilities, highlighting the company's commitment to providing state-of-the-art security solutions.

data.title: Xos Delivers Third Consecutive Quarter of Positive Operating and Free Cash Flow, Accelerates Platform Expansion Across Vehicles, Powertrains, and Energy Storage
data.description: Xos has achieved a third consecutive quarter of positive operating and free cash flow, marking a significant milestone for the company. This success has enabled Xos to accelerate the expansion of its platform across three key product lines. This achievement showcases the company's financial stability and growth, with significant progress evident in their operations and financial performance.

data.title: Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. Announces Proposed Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In Gardner, Massachusetts, as of March 26, 2026, Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: POCI), known for designing and producing advanced optical instruments for medical and defense/aerospace sectors, revealed its intention to start an underwritten public offering of its common stock. The offering's progress depends on market conditions, making it uncertain whether or when the offering will finalize, along with the exact size or terms involved in the offering.

data.title: NurExone Strengthens U.S. Manufacturing Strategy Through Exo-Top Sublicense Agreement
data.description: Exo-Top Inc. has been established as a key subsidiary in the United States to bolster manufacturing, clinical progress, and to drive long-term value creation. This move is aimed at strengthening the company's foothold in the U.S. market and enhancing its overall strategic position. This strategic U.S. subsidiary is expected to play a pivotal role in advancing manufacturing processes and clinical developments, ultimately contributing to sustained value generation in the long run.

data.title: CROWN HOLDINGS, INC. APPOINTS DR. JOHN M. ROST EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT AND CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER - ASIA PACIFIC AND TRANSIT PACKAGING
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on March 26, 2026, Crown Holdings, Inc. disclosed that Dr. John M. Rost is set to become the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer for Asia Pacific and Transit Packaging starting from April 1, 2026. Dr. Rost, who presently holds the position of President, will be taking on this new role. Crown Holdings, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CCK.

NASDAQ ENDS LOWER BY 520.75 POINTS, A DROP OF 2.38%, CLOSING AT 21,409.08.
S&P 500 FINISHES UNOFFICIALLY DOWN BY 115.62 POINTS, OR 1.75%, AT 6,476.28.

data.title: Eisai and Nuvation Bio Announce Marketing Authorisation Application for Taletrectinib for the Treatment of Advanced ROS1-Positive Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer Validated by the European Medicines Agency
data.description: The Marketing Authorisation Application (MAA) has undergone validation and has been accepted for full approval review within a standard timeline. Furthermore, additional submissions are scheduled for the United Kingdom, Canada, and other territories covered by Eisai's licenses. Taletrectinib, which is already authorized in certain regions, will be subject to further filings in these aforementioned jurisdictions.

DOW JONES ENDS DOWN 482.46 POINTS, EQUAL TO 1.04%, CLOSING AT 45,947.03.

data.title: ICF Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, an audio-only webcast will be held. Interested participants can access the webcast at https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/pw36jwo8. Registration for participants is available at https://register-conf.media-server.com/register/BIf3fcaa2693ad46d7b2190a7bc412bc8b. The event is organized by ICF and will take place in Reston, Va. This news was released on March 26, 2026 via PRNewswire.
